title: Youtubers Ingame
body:
You have very popular Youtubers in this Modpack. You can spawn them with custom Spawn eggs and they are in a custom Item Tab. All Youtubers are passive so when you attack them they will hunt you so be careful! There are Youtubers like BastiGHG, Papaplatte or also myself!? (Creator)
Have much fun with this modpack and subscribe to my youtube Channel @JaxX-u4t.
